title: Unprocessed artificial resins
description: Synthetic resins in their unprocessed/raw form intended for further industrial use or processing (e.g., polymer precursors, resin granules, tacky unformed resins), excluding semi-processed forms intended for finishing or consumer use.

title: Unprocessed plastics
description: Plastics in raw or unprocessed form intended for industrial manufacturing and molding processes (e.g., pellets, granules, powders), not finished plastic products for consumers.

title: Fire extinguishing and fire prevention compositions
description: Compositions and chemical formulations for extinguishing fires or preventing ignition and spread of fire, including powders, foams, gels, retardants and other fire suppression chemical mixtures designed for industrial or commercial fire control.
keywords: bicarbonate of soda for chemical purposes

title: Tempering and soldering preparations
description: Chemical preparations and fluxes used in tempering, soldering, brazing or heat-treatment processes, including fluxes, anti-oxidation pastes and coupling agents applied during metal joining or metallurgical heat treatments.

title: Substances for tanning animal skins and hides
description: Chemical agents and preparations used in the tanning, processing and preservation of animal skins and hides, such as tanning liquors, tanning salts and tanning accelerators intended for leather manufacture.
keywords: bate for dressing skins / dressing, except oils, for skins

title: Adhesives for use in industry
description: Adhesive compounds and bonding agents formulated for industrial applications (assembly, manufacturing, structural bonding), including epoxy adhesives, industrial glues, industrial-grade contact adhesives and adhesive primers used in production environments.
keywords: adhesives for paperhanging / adhesives for wallpaper

title: Compost, manures and fertilizers
description: Soil conditioners and nutrient preparations for agricultural, horticultural and forestry use, including organic composts, manure products, mineral and chemical fertilizers and soil enrichment formulations for industrial-scale or commercial agricultural application.
keywords: agricultural chemicals, except fungicides, herbicides, insecticides and parasiticides
fish meal fertilizers / fish meal fertilisers
gypsum for use as a fertilizer

title: Biological preparations for use in industry and science
description: Biotechnological and biological products intended for industrial or scientific use, such as enzyme preparations, microbial cultures for industrial processes, biological reagents, fermentation starters and other biologically-derived materials used in manufacturing or laboratory work.

title: Sensitized paper and photographic chemical products
description: Photographic materials and related chemical products including sensitized photographic paper, light-sensitive films, emulsions, developers, fixers and other chemical supplies used in photographic processing and imaging production.

title: Tyre repairing compositions
description: Chemical compositions, repair compounds and patching materials formulated specifically for the repair, sealing or vulcanizing of tyres and inner tubes, including repair adhesives and plug compounds used in tyre maintenance.

title: Salt for preserving, other than for foodstuffs
description: Salts and saline chemical preparations intended for industrial preservation or preservation of non-food items (e.g., hides, materials), explicitly excluding culinary or food-preserving salts.
keywords: salt for preserving, other than for foodstuffs
salts of precious metals for industrial purposes

title: Additives for use in the food industry (industrial ingredients)
description: Chemical and biochemical additives used in industrial food processing and in the manufacture of food products, such as pectin, lecithin, industrial enzymes and chemical preservatives supplied as raw materials to food manufacturers (classification for industrial supply, not finished foodstuffs).
keywords: artificial sweeteners for the food industry
plant extracts for the food industry
tea extracts for the food industry
cream of tartar for the food industry

title: Ingredients for use in the manufacture of cosmetics and pharmaceuticals
description: Raw chemical and natural ingredients supplied for use in the production of cosmetics and pharmaceutical preparations, including vitamins, essential oils, antioxidants, inactive excipients and industrial-grade preservatives intended as manufacturing inputs.

title: Filtering materials (mineral, vegetable and ceramic particulate forms)
description: Materials used for filtration in industrial or scientific contexts, including particulate mineral, vegetable or ceramic filter media supplied for filtering liquids, gases or industrial effluents (e.g., diatomaceous earth, ceramic granules, activated mineral particles).
keywords: ceramic materials in particulate form, for use as filtering media

title: Industrial catalysts and catalyst preparations
description: Catalytic substances and catalyst preparations used to accelerate or enable chemical reactions in industrial processes, including heterogeneous and homogeneous catalysts offered for manufacturing, refining or chemical production.

title: Industrial solvents and degreasing agents
description: Solvent formulations and degreasing chemicals intended for industrial cleaning, chemical processing or formulation tasks, including organic solvents, aqueous solvent mixtures and solvent blends supplied for manufacturing or laboratory use.

title: Chemical preservatives for industrial use
description: Preservative agents and stabilizers used to prevent spoilage, oxidation or degradation in industrial raw materials, intermediates or manufactured goods (e.g., antioxidants, anti-corrosion inhibitors supplied as industrial additives).
